parts.text:
Your task is to execute the scheduled task below as specified in that task's description.

If the scheduled work is complete and nothing needs reporting, stop taking actions. Do not use cron to mark the run complete, re-run it, or modify schedules. A later terminal phase will handle completion for you.

A normal assistant message ends this execution pass. Do not end the execution pass with a progress update, a promise to wait, or a statement like "I'll wait for the subagents." The later terminal phase cannot do task work, write files, call ordinary tools, or repair incomplete output; it can only choose the final cron handoff tool.

If you spawn subagents or start asynchronous work, keep working until their results are available in this execution pass and you have completed any parent-owned synthesis, verification, persistence, and artifact writes required by the scheduled task. If you cannot consume the child results before your assistant response would complete the execution pass, do not delegate the required work that way; do the required work directly in this worker turn instead.

[WORKER TASK]
job_id: iwsdk-daily-build-summary-pm
mode: task

[BODY]
## IWSDK Daily Build (PM Cycle) — Evening Summary & Validation

This is the final wrap-up job for the afternoon build cycle. Three responsibilities:

### 1. Deliver evening briefing

Read `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary-pm.md` and `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status-pm.json`.

Deliver a concise summary including:
- Game name and one-line concept
- Live URL (GitHub Pages) and repo URL
- Key features (5-8 bullets)
- Scale: file count and line count
- Total build time (accumulated across all rounds)
- Number of rounds it took

### 2. Validate `.agent/journal/` in GitHub

Check that the build journal exists in the repo:
```
gh api repos/ellyz2426/<game-name>/contents/.agent/journal --jq '.[].name' 2>&1
```

If missing or incomplete:
- Find session JSONL files from `~/agents/` that correspond to today's PM build
- Copy them into the game's `.agent/journal/` directory
- Create `.agent/journal/state/` if it doesn't exist
- Commit and push

### 3. Validate GitHub Pages deployment

```
curl -sI https://ellyz2426.github.io/<game-name>/ | head -3
```

If not returning HTTP 200:
- Rebuild: `cd ~/workspace/<game-name> && npm run build`
- Redeploy to gh-pages branch
- Trigger pages build: `gh api repos/ellyz2426/<game-name>/pages/builds -X POST`
- Verify it comes up

### 4. Mark build complete

Update `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status-pm.json`:
- Set `status` to `"complete"` regardless (the build window is over)
- This prevents any straggler check-in jobs from starting new rounds

Deliver to main chat and Telegram.

[RUN CONTEXT]
scheduled_for_local: Mon 2026-06-22 20:30:00 PDT (America/Los_Angeles)
trigger_reason: scheduled
attempt: 1

item.output:
# Latest PM Build Summary — 2026-06-22

## Neon Pac VR (#64) — Round 6

**Game:** Pac-Man arcade with VR support
**Status:** Deployed, waiting continuation (147/360 min)
**Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-pac/
**Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-pac

### Round 6 Additions
- **Power-ups system:** 4 collectible power-up types (octahedron pickups):
  - Speed Boost — 50% faster Pac-Man for 5s
  - Ghost Freeze — ghosts stop moving for 3s
  - Score Doubler — 2x all points for 8s
  - Shield — absorb one ghost hit (single use)
- **Power-up HUD status** with active effect labels and countdown timers
- **Help/How-to-Play panel** — 11th PanelUI panel covering controls, rules, power-ups, and ghost AI
- **14 new achievements** (137 total) for power-up collection and mastery
- **4 new procedural audio effects** — collect, expire, shield block, ghost freeze
- **Power-up manager** with localStorage persistence for collection stats

### Cumulative Stats (6 rounds)
- **LOC:** 5,254
- **Panels:** 11 PanelUI panels
- **Achievements:** 137
- **Game Modes:** 7 (Classic, Speed, Dark, Survival, Marathon, Zen, Daily)
- **Maze Layouts:** 6
- **Pac-Man Skins:** 5
- **Maze Themes:** 5
- **Power-Up Types:** 4
- **Build Time:** 147 minutes across 6 rounds

item.thinking: I have 10 JSONL files. Let me figure out which ones are from today's PM build. The build started at 19:00 UTC (12 PM PT) on June 22. Let me check timestamps and look for references to "neon-pac" in these sessions.

item.name: exec
item.arguments:
{"command":"# Check timestamps and first lines of each JSONL to identify PM build sessions
for f in /home/hatch/agents/agent-*/sessions/*.jsonl; do
  agent_id=$(basename $(dirname $(dirname "$f")))
  mod_time=$(stat -c '%Y %y' "$f" | head -1)
  first_line=$(head -c 500 "$f" | grep -o '"neon-pac\|neon.pac\|Pac.Man\|pac.man' | head -1)
  echo "$agent_id | mod: $(stat -c '%y' "$f" | cut -d. -f1) | match: $first_line"
done"}
